creator: mnd999@gmail.com
text:
If I use the network (an atheros card on a WPA netowork) for anything siginificant the machine locks up as per the trace below. Interestingly, it doesn't seem to have a problem with aquiring an address via DHCP.

Previous frame inner to this frame (corrupt stack?)

Fix: 

Going to roll back to my old kernel I think.
How-To-Repeat: Boot PC, fetch someting large or open firefox, go myspace or any other website really (although the really simple firefox start page is usually okay).
